blocks.text: Final round at TPC San Antonio today. Reitan sits T17 at -4, four shots off Smalley's lead — a top-10 finish would be the perfect Masters tune-up heading into Augusta next week.
🚴 Sun 10:00 — Tour of Flanders: seven Norwegians in the cobbled Monument from Antwerp to Oudenaarde
🎮 Mon 02:00 — PGL CS2 Major Bucharest opens — rain's biggest stage of 2026
